array.string: launchctl setenv EDITOR 'zed --wait' launchctl setenv GIT_TERMINAL_PROMPT 1 launchctl setenv OPENCODE_ENABLE_EXA true launchctl setenv OPENCODE_EXPERIMENTAL true launchctl setenv XDG_CACHE_HOME /Users/erazemk/.cache launchctl setenv XDG_CONFIG_HOME /Users/erazemk/.config launchctl setenv XDG_DATA_HOME /Users/erazemk/.local/share launchctl setenv SSH_AUTH_SOCK /Users/erazemk/Library/Containers/com.bitwarden.desktop/Data/.bitwarden-ssh-agent.sock
